docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76713562) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A. SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 77132483), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO DISCOVER BANK SERVED AUG-11-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAVAGE, EMILY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-26-2025 CONTINUED TO JAN-28-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-10-2026 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JAN-28-2026 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $477.65 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 78220134) AS TO DEFENDANT SAVAGE, EMILY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-10-2026 CONTINUED TO JUL-07-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAVAGE, EMILY $25,947.81 PRINCIPAL, $477.65 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $26,425.46, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-07-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
